title: 151® ADHESIVES, Exterior Sticky Pads, 80 Pack
features: PERMANENT FIXING, EXTERIOR GRADE: 151 Adhesives Exterior Sticky Pads, holds securely and permanently. Each of the large pack size of 80 pads are 20mm x 20mm approx. Use outside the home, around the garden, allotment, shed or workshop.
RESISTANT TO SUNLIGHT, OIL & WATER! 151 Adhesives Exterior Sticky Pads, use outside the home, around the garden, allotment, shed or workshop. Ready to use, double sided adhesive foam pads.
QUICK & EASY TO USE: 151 Adhesives Exterior Sticky Pads, suitable for securing home name or number signs, lightweight wall art, notices.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Ready to use adhesive sticky pads. 80 pack
